name: Salad Greens a La Chinois
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare all ingredients.
2. Heat oil in a wok to smoking point. Stir fry garlic for 1 minute. Add cucumber and pepper, stir fry for 1 minute. Add tomatoes and lettuce, stir fry for another minute. Mix salt, vinegar, and sugar into the mixture. Continue stirring until all ingredients are well combined and lettuce leaves are wilted.
3. Serve immediately.
